problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Phytoremediation. Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
